rationale: CI/environment failure for azureKMS tests on RHEL 7.0/7.1; no driver spec behavior involved.

CI improvement to run auth tests under ASAN; no driver spec behavior change involved.
CI performance issue; Valgrind tasks exceeding time limits, no spec behavior involved.

User support question about Atlas portal Azure KeyVault credentials; not a driver bug.
Flaky assertion in test framework timing code (bson_get_monotonic_time); internal test infra, not spec.
Bug split DRIVERS-2369; sessions spec requires causal consistency disabled in implicit sessions; driver enabled it.
Improvement split from DRIVERS-2286; proactive spec rollout for range index support, driver not previously wrong.
Re-enabling zstd compression tests on macOS after OS upgrade; CI/build work only.
Removing deprecated ERR_load_BIO_strings call for OpenSSL 3.0+ compatibility; build warning fix.
Driver rejects double-type connectionId during handshake; spec allows numeric types; C++ driver has same bug.

Compile warnings in libbson on Windows VS2019; build issue, no spec behavior.

API ergonomics change splitting min/max setters for range encryption options; not a spec nonconformance.
Driver segfaults on valid OP_MSG with optional CRC32C checksum; wire protocol spec defines this as valid.
Improvement split from DRIVERS-2524; proactive QEv2 spec rollout to stop creating ECC collection.
Improvement split from DRIVERS-2503; proactive spec rollout to support int64 connectionId in heartbeats.
Internal refactor removing legacy code paths for unsupported wire versions; no spec behavior change.

Dependency version bump for zlib security vulnerability CVE-2018-25032; no spec behavior involved.
Improvement split from DRIVERS-1916; proactive rollout requiring OP_MSG for hello handshake per updated spec.
OP_QUERY egress counter overcounts DNS records; internal metrics bug, no spec rule violated.
Removing deprecated Codecov Bash Uploader; CI tooling change only.
Compilation failure of test file with GCC 13.0.1; build issue, no spec behavior.
Speculative auth state not reset correctly on reconnect; auth spec defines speculative handshake behavior.
Improvement split DRIVERS-2249; updating docs.mongodb.com links in documentation; no behavior change.
Crash when insufficient memory for performance counters; internal allocation bug, no spec rule.

Removing deprecated functions from documentation; docs cleanup, no behavior change.

Improvement split DRIVERS-2546; proactive time-series scalability spec rollout, driver not previously wrong.
Installation docs missing dev package instructions; documentation gap, no driver behavior involved.

QEv2 state collections created before wire version check; spec requires checking server version support first.
aligned_alloc undefined on Android; build/porting issue, no spec behavior.
Adding defensive null assertions to client/pool API; internal API hardening, no spec rule.

Adding index creation helper API; ergonomics improvement over sending raw createIndexes commands.
Adding extended JSON output for BSON arrays; new API feature, not a spec conformance fix.

Bumping minimum C standard from C89 to C99; build standard change, no spec behavior.

Access violation joining unstarted monitor thread after EAGAIN; implementation bug, no specific SDAM spec rule.
Segfault on malformed OP_MSG input in serverless proxy context; robustness bug, spec doesn't define malformed input handling.
Internal refactor exploring alternatives to X macro pattern in mongoc-rpc.c; no behavior change.
